title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Log out - Continue
scenario: Verify login and logout flow in App Settings under General > Account
steps: Verify "Your account" text with Name and Email fields populated
Verify login dialog appears with Cancel and Continue options
Verify "Your account" text shows "You aren't currently logged in"
Verify Log in button is visible
expected: User can log in successfully (Name and Email fields populated under "Your account"), then log out successfully (dialog with Cancel/Continue appears, after Continue user is logged out, "Your account" shows "You aren't currently logged in", and Log in button is visible).
